items.title: Payment workflow V1
acceptance: Payment request -> approval -> finance execution -> ledger -> reports is runnable.
Application, OCR, payment, and ledger statuses are visible.

items.title: Organization configuration
acceptance: Organizations can be added or removed from backend configuration.
Tax mode, default currency, store relationship, and reporting inclusion are configurable.

items.title: Access and permissions
acceptance: Login, users, roles, organization scope, data permissions, approval permissions, and menu access are configured.

items.title: Ledger and reports
acceptance: Ledger entries are created from approved financial workflow events.
Boss can see group and organization cashflow/report views.

items.title: iiko and warehouse planning
acceptance: Central warehouse and store warehouse flows are planned before implementation.
